name: Sotsugyo Bakamentari
overview: Horiguchi Gaku, Yonezawa Mao, Ita Koki and Jin Jun are friends and they all attend the same prestigious university. They have spent most of their time studying and they have 90 days before their graduations. Greatly inspired to become men by the time they graduate, they meet girls who are ideal in their own opinion. At times they collide, at others, they fail or forget their objective? They keep having hard struggles along with warm friendships.

trailers.title: 「卒業バカメンタリー」映像初公開第１弾PR！ジャニーズWEST藤井流星、濵田崇裕が男としてきちんと卒業するまでを描くドキュメンタリー風青春ドラマ！
